title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, tests and maintains software applications.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyzes data and builds predictive models.

title: AI Engineer
description: Develops AI-powered applications using machine learning and deep learning.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Builds, trains and deploys machine learning models.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Designs user interfaces and user experiences.

title: Business Analyst
description: Analyzes business requirements and proposes technical solutions.

title: Data Analyst
description: Collects, cleans and analyzes business data.
